extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows—criminal proceedings of 0 against the Company, 0 against Subsidiaries and 1 against Directors; statutory/regulatory actions of 1 against the Company and 1 against Subsidiaries; and tax claims of 11 against the Company plus 58 against Subsidiaries. I excluded all “By our Company,” “By our Subsidiaries,” and other by-party rows; the quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is the stated ₹387.95 million plus ₹759.43 million, or ₹1,147.38 million, converted to ₹114.738 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹1,164.68 million as of March 31, 2025, not a re-sum of the line items, converted to ₹116.468 crore. The company-wide customer concentration figures are for full Fiscal 2025 and use revenue from operations as the denominator: top five customers 62.27% and top ten customers 81.54%. The source tables use ₹ millions; conversion is ₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore, so each crore field is the source amount multiplied by 0.1.
